title: M16 Realistic Universe And Shadow Validation

items.title: Default source universe is versioned
items.description: The repo defines a default `core_research_12` universe manifest and load_settings falls back to it when QUANTA_SOURCE_SYMBOLS is not provided.

items.title: Snapshot payload exposes supplementary validation
items.description: market_data.sync writes shadow_validation into source_watermark_json and latest snapshot / system health expose the validation state.

items.title: Tushare provider falls back to a date with real daily bars
items.description: When the current open day has no published daily bars yet, latest_available_biz_date resolves to the most recent trade date that actually returns tracked daily rows.

items.title: Live sync validates against AkShare and BaoStock
items.description: In the core_research_12 universe, live isolated sync records shadow validation results and both supplementary providers match the canonical Tushare close data within tolerance.

items.title: Live backfill remains bounded and idempotent
items.description: The isolated live backfill smoke verifies first-run insert and second-run skip semantics on recent open days without turning into an unbounded multi-source regression.
